overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing the character Franklin walking along a sunny beach, transitioning from a rocky shoreline through shallow water onto sandy beach with distant mountains and city skyline visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky beach shoreline with shallow tidal pools

events.description: character steps from shallow water onto dry sandy beach
rounding the large rock outcrop reveals open ocean and distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the rocky shoreline through shallow water onto the sandy beach, navigating around a large rock formation on the right

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible sandy bottom at the shoreline
large white weathered rock formation at the water's edge
expansive sandy beach stretching along the coastline
dry rocky terrain with sparse vegetation rising from the beach
hazy mountain range forming the backdrop behind the beach

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow tidal pools near a large rock outcrop on a sunny beach. The terrain transitions from water to dry sand as the character moves forward, with rocky hills visible to the left and mountains in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with panoramic ocean and city views

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the open beach with the ocean on the right and distant city skyline visible across the water

entered.detail: urban skyline with tall buildings visible across the water
calm blue ocean water extending to the horizon
large mountainous terrain forming the backdrop behind the city
scattered palm trees along the rocky coastline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open sandy beach with unobstructed views of the ocean on the right and a distant city skyline across the water. The large rock formation is now behind, and the beach stretches ahead with mountains and scattered palm trees visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastline that transitions from a rocky tidal area to an expansive open beach. It begins with the character wading through shallow tidal pools beside a large rock outcrop, with rocky hills framing the left side of the view. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from water to dry sand, leaving the rock formation behind. The scene then opens up to a wide stretch of beach, revealing an unobstructed view of the ocean on the right and a distant city skyline across the water. Finally, the perspective expands further to show scattered palm trees and mountains standing against the horizon.
